code:
type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next(_ color: Color) -> Color
  match color
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn label(_ color: Color) -> String
  match color
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let c0 = Color.Red
print(label(c0))
let c1 = next(c0)
print(label(c1))
let c2 = next(c1)
print(label(c2))
let c3 = next(c2)
print(label(c3))
